Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., has announced that the Texas Business Court granted his motion for expedited discovery, requiring Fermi to provide documentation and testimony regarding its recent actions, including the imposition of a 70% supermajority voting requirement. This development is a significant win for Neugebauer and Fermi's shareholders, who have been seeking greater accountability and transparency from the company's board. Neugebauer will also host a Town Hall webinar with analysts on June 30 to address questions and provide updates on his efforts to restore "good governance" to Fermi.
